title: Britain's onboard train wi-fi is one of Europe's worst. This is how people manage
summary: BBC Business testing found train wi-fi between Norwich and London struggles with connectivity compared to other European services. The report explores how passengers manage with unreliable onboard internet access.
content: We tested the wi-fi on the train between Norwich and London to see how easy it was to connect.

zh.title: 英国列车车上wifi是欧洲最差的之一，乘客们这样应对
zh.summary: 英国广播公司的商业测试发现，诺里奇至伦敦之间的列车wifi连接性比其他欧洲服务差。该报告探讨了乘客如何应对不可靠的车上互联网接入。

title: Trump plans to appeal order allowing all importers that paid struck-down tariffs to seek refunds
summary: The Trump administration is appealing a court order that allows companies to seek refunds for invalidated tariffs they previously paid. The legal battle centers on whether the tariff policies and their reversal will result in broad compensation claims. The outcome will determine how much capital companies can recover.
content: The Trump administration said it intended to appeal a judge's order allowing all companies that paid the invalidated duties to seek refunds.

zh.title: 特朗普计划上诉允许所有已支付被推翻关税的进口商寻求退款的命令
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在上诉一项法院命令，该命令允许公司为之前支付的无效关税寻求退款。这场法律战的焦点是关税政策及其撤销是否会导致广泛的赔偿索赔。最终结果将决定公司能收回多少资本。

title: Ferrari wanted to take on Chinese EVs with the Luce - then the backlash started
summary: Ferrari's first electric vehicle, the Luce, has faced intense criticism from enthusiasts who argue it abandons the brand's core identity and values. The luxury carmaker positioned the EV to compete with Chinese manufacturers but encountered unexpected resistance from its traditional fanbase. The backlash raises questions about balancing innovation with brand heritage.
content: The brand's first EV has been heavily criticised, with some saying it has abandoned Ferrari's roots.

zh.title: 法拉利想用Luce对抗中国电动汽车——随后遭到强烈反对
zh.summary: 法拉利首款电动汽车Luce面临爱好者的激烈批评，他们认为它背弃了品牌的核心身份和价值观。这家豪华汽车制造商将这款电动汽车定位为与中国制造商竞争，但却遭到传统粉丝的意外抵制。这种反弹引发了关于如何平衡创新与品牌传承的问题。

title: As Big Tech’s power demand surges, data centers bring utilities a huge new profit center
summary: Big Tech's surging demand for power to support AI infrastructure is creating massive new profit opportunities for utility companies. Financial markets have not yet priced in the possibility that major tech firms might acquire regulated utilities directly. This consolidation could fundamentally reshape the energy sector.
content: The market hasn’t fully priced the next logical step for the AI buildout: Big Tech acquiring regulated utilities outright.

zh.title: 随着大科技公司用电需求激增，数据中心为电力公司带来巨大新利润机会
zh.summary: 大科技公司对电力的激增需求（用于支持人工智能基础设施）正在为公用事业公司创造大量新的盈利机会。金融市场尚未计入大型科技公司可能直接收购受监管公用事业公司的可能性。这种整合可能会从根本上重塑能源部门。

title: China’s next export shock walks on two legs — and costs less than a used car
summary: China is investing heavily in affordable humanoid robots to reduce manufacturing costs and establish competitive advantages in global markets. These robots could become the nation's next major export category, disrupting factory operations worldwide. The affordability of these systems makes them accessible even to smaller manufacturers.
content: Beijing is funding humanoid robots to slash Chinese factory costs and build a competitive advantage.

zh.title: 中国下一个出口冲击——会走路且价格低于二手车
zh.summary: 中国正在大力投资经济实惠的仿人机器人，以降低制造成本并在全球市场上建立竞争优势。这些机器人可能成为该国的下一个主要出口类别，将对全球工厂运营造成冲击。这些系统的经济性使得即使是小型制造商也能够获得。

title: Why double-digit earnings growth won’t stop the next bear market
summary: Despite strong corporate earnings growth, historical patterns suggest the stock market is entering the final stages of a bull market with increased bear market risk. Rising S&P 500 profits have traditionally preceded market downturns, signaling caution for equity investors. Market history indicates stocks are vulnerable despite solid financial fundamentals.
content: Spiking S&P 500 profits often signal the final innings of a bull market. History says stocks are on thin ice.

zh.title: 为什么两位数的盈利增长无法阻止下一个熊市
zh.summary: 尽管企业盈利增长强劲，历史模式表明股票市场正进入牛市的最后阶段，熊市风险增加。标普500指数利润的上升历来先于市场下跌，向股权投资者发出警告信号。市场历史表明，尽管财务基本面稳健，股票仍然容易受到冲击。

title: America is losing the AI productivity war to 3.5 million Chinese STEM graduates
summary: China's pool of 3.5 million STEM graduates is positioning the country to win the AI productivity race against American companies struggling with strategic missteps. Big Tech's structural errors are exacerbating America's talent disadvantage in artificial intelligence development. This widening gap could reshape the global AI industry and investment landscape.
content: Big Tech’s structural mistakes are costing stock investors and fueling a massive talent crisis.

zh.title: 美国在与中国350万STEM毕业生的AI生产力竞赛中落后
zh.summary: 中国350万STEM毕业生的储备库使该国在AI生产力竞赛中处于优势地位，而美国公司却在苦于战略失误。大科技公司的结构性错误加剧了美国在人工智能开发中的人才劣势。这种日益扩大的差距可能会重塑全球AI产业和投资格局。

title: This bear market signal Wall Street ignores is putting your money at risk right now
summary: A veteran trader warns of a potential 50% market decline and identifies three dangerous portfolio mistakes destroying investor wealth. The signal represents significant risk that Wall Street is dismissing.
content: Veteran trader Steve Burns prepares for a 50% decline and exposes the 3 “deadly stock-market sins” destroying portfolios.

zh.title: 华尔街忽视的这个熊市信号正在危害你的资金安全
zh.summary: 一位资深交易员警告市场可能下跌50%，并指出三个严重破坏投资者财富的投资组合错误。这个信号代表华尔街正在忽视的重大风险。

title: Your portfolio can’t afford the real bill for the Iran war
summary: While the Pentagon officially reports the Iran conflict at $29 billion, the true economic cost is substantially higher and fueling inflation. This hidden expense has broader implications for investment portfolios and economic stability.
content: The Pentagon claims the conflict has cost $29 billion — but the true cost is much higher and it’s fueling inflation.

zh.title: 你的投资组合承受不起伊朗战争的真实账单
zh.summary: 尽管五角大楼官方报告伊朗冲突耗资290亿美元，但真实经济成本要高得多，并加剧通货膨胀。这笔隐形支出对投资组合和经济稳定性有更广泛的影响。

title: Trump considers dropping Freedom 250 concerts in D.C. after artists pull out
summary: President Trump indicated on Truth Social that the Freedom 250 concert series in Washington, D.C. may be cancelled if artists continue withdrawing participation. Multiple performers have already declined to participate in the event.
content: In a post on Truth Social on ‌Saturday, the president suggested the concert series may no longer ‌be necessary if performers continue to back out.

zh.title: 特朗普考虑在艺术家退出后取消华盛顿特区的自由250演唱会
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在Truth Social上表示，如果艺术家继续退出参与，华盛顿特区的自由250演唱会系列可能会被取消。多位表演者已经拒绝参加该活动。

title: DOJ seeks Judge Eleanor Ross recusal in Georgia election case, citing reports she was disciplined
summary: The Department of Justice has requested that Judge Eleanor Ross recuse herself from a Georgia election case, citing disciplinary reports against her. The DOJ is separately suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for withholding election records.
content: The DOJ is suing Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensberger over his refusal to give the department election records.

zh.title: 司法部要求法官埃莉诺·罗斯回避格鲁吉亚选举案件，声称其受过纪律处分
zh.summary: 司法部已要求法官埃莉诺·罗斯回避格鲁吉亚选举案件，理由是她曾受过纪律处分。司法部同时起诉格鲁吉亚州务卿布拉德·拉芬斯珀格隐瞒选举记录。

title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
summary: A NASA-themed ETF has attracted $2.6 billion in retail investor flows in two months, driven by anticipation of SpaceX's upcoming IPO. The fund provides direct exposure to SpaceX before its public offering, making it popular among retail traders.
content: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.

zh.title: 两个月，26亿美元：NASA ETF如何将SpaceX IPO机会变成热门零售交易
zh.summary: 一只以NASA为主题的ETF在两个月内吸引了26亿美元的零售投资者资金流入，由对SpaceX即将推出IPO的预期所驱动。该基金在SpaceX公开发行前为投资者提供了直接敞口，使其在零售交易者中备受欢迎。

title: My friend, 62, earns $20,000 a year. Should she take Social Security now — and claim survivor’s benefit at 67?
summary: A financial advisor addresses when a low-earning 62-year-old should claim Social Security benefits, with an estimated break-even point at age 78. The guidance examines strategies for optimizing survivor's benefits alongside personal retirement income.
content: “I calculated her break-even point to be around age 78.”

zh.title: 我的朋友62岁，年收入20,000美元。她现在应该领取社会保障金吗——并在67岁时申请遗属福利？
zh.summary: 一位财务顾问解答了年收入较低的62岁人士何时应该申请社会保障福利的问题，估计的收支平衡点是78岁。该指导探讨了在个人退休收入基础上优化遗属福利的策略。

title: My husband took out a $100,000 Parent PLUS loan for his daughter. She dropped out, citing mental-health issues. Should we refinance?
summary: A family faces financial hardship after taking out $100,000 in Parent PLUS loans for a daughter who dropped out of school due to mental health concerns. Financial experts assess refinancing options given the slim likelihood of the borrower repaying the debt.
content: “There is little to no chance that she will ever be able to repay these loans.”

zh.title: 我丈夫为女儿申请了100,000美元的父母PLUS贷款。她因心理健康问题退学了。我们应该重新融资吗？
zh.summary: 一个家庭在为因心理健康问题从学校退学的女儿申请了100,000美元的父母PLUS贷款后面临财务困难。鉴于借款人还债的可能性很小，财务专家评估了重新融资选项。

title: The stock index you invest in isn’t always the most important decision. Here’s what matters even more.
summary: Market analysis shows that time invested in stocks matters significantly more than which specific index investors choose. Historical data from the Dow's 130-year record demonstrates that consistent market participation outweighs index selection strategy.
content: Time in the stock market is more important than index selection — and the Dow’s 130-year history proves it.

zh.title: 你投资的股票指数并不总是最重要的决定。以下是更重要的因素。
zh.summary: 市场分析显示，投资股票的时间比投资者选择的具体指数更重要。道琼斯指数130年的历史数据表明，持续的市场参与胜过指数选择战略。

title: 67 million kids haven’t signed up for ‘Trump accounts.’ Here’s what they could be missing out on.
summary: Approximately 6 million children have enrolled in "Trump accounts," but roughly 67 million eligible minors have not yet signed up. Financial benefits are available to those who establish these accounts, representing unclaimed value for many American families.
content: Nearly 6 million American children have been signed up for “Trump accounts,” but millions more are eligible — and they could be leaving free money on the table.

zh.title: 6700万名儿童还没有注册"特朗普账户"。以下是他们可能错过的。
zh.summary: 大约600万儿童已经注册了"特朗普账户"，但大约6700万合格的未成年人还没有注册。那些建立这些账户的人可以获得财务福利，这对许多美国家庭来说代表着未领取的价值。

title: This mutual fund lets you buy SpaceX stock before the IPO — but what are you actually getting?
summary: A mutual fund provides pre-IPO access to SpaceX stock ahead of the company's public offering. The article examines what investors actually receive through this fund and questions whether the SpaceX hype justifies the investment.
content: The hype surrounding SpaceX and the scale of its ambitions will surely drive short-term demand for shares in the IPO.

zh.title: 这只共同基金让你在首次公开募股前购买SpaceX股票——但你实际上得到了什么？
zh.summary: 一只共同基金在公司公开募股前提供SpaceX股票的前期接入权。文章审视投资者通过该基金实际获得的东西，并质疑SpaceX的炒作是否能证明这项投资的合理性。

title: Even the Ronald Reagan Institute doesn’t believe the ‘waste, fraud and abuse’ baloney
summary: The Ronald Reagan Institute challenges claims about waste, fraud, and abuse in government spending. The analysis suggests this issue has profound implications for U.S. democracy and governance.
content: This may be the single most important issue facing U.S. democracy today.

zh.title: 甚至罗纳德·里根研究所也不相信"浪费、欺诈和滥用"的胡言乱语
zh.summary: 罗纳德·里根研究所质疑关于政府开支中浪费、欺诈和滥用的说法。分析表明这个问题对美国民主和治理有深远影响。

title: The death of Nascar driver Kyle Busch is renewing the debate around indexed universal life insurance
summary: Kyle Busch's death has sparked renewed discussion about indexed universal life (IUL) insurance as a retirement planning tool. Financial experts caution that IUL policies should not be viewed as guaranteed retirement solutions.
content: If you’re looking for a “sure thing” in a retirement plan, indexed universal life is probably not the answer.

zh.title: 纳斯卡车手凯尔·布什的去世重新引发了关于指数万能人寿保险的辩论
zh.summary: 凯尔·布什的去世引发了对指数万能人寿（IUL）保险作为退休规划工具的新讨论。金融专家警告说IUL保单不应被视为有保障的退休解决方案。

title: At least 3.5 million people have lost food stamp access as Trump's 'big beautiful bill' cuts take effect, analysis finds
summary: Recent policy changes have resulted in at least 3.5 million Americans losing access to food stamp benefits through the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program. The cuts take effect amid broader cost-of-living challenges facing American households.
content: Even as Americans confront higher costs, millions of people have lost Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program food benefits.

zh.title: 分析发现，随着特朗普的"大而美好的法案"削减生效，至少350万人失去了食品券获取权
zh.summary: 最近的政策变化导致至少350万美国人失去了补充营养援助计划（SNAP）的食品券获取权。这些削减在美国家庭面临更广泛的生活成本挑战的背景下生效。

title: A record number of Americans are funding Roth IRAs — here’s how to open one
summary: Record numbers of Americans are opening Roth IRA accounts, indicating strong interest in tax-advantaged retirement savings. The article provides guidance on how to establish a Roth IRA for retirement planning.

zh.title: 创纪录数量的美国人正在为罗斯个人退休账户供款——以下是如何开设一个
zh.summary: 创纪录数量的美国人正在开设罗斯个人退休账户，表明人们对税收优惠的退休储蓄有强烈兴趣。该文章提供了如何为退休规划建立罗斯个人退休账户的指导。

title: Travelers to Europe may be leaving money on the table. Here's why
summary: American travelers visiting Europe can claim refunds on value-added taxes paid on certain purchases. This often-overlooked opportunity allows visitors to recover a significant portion of sales taxes through VAT refund programs.
content: Travelers to Europe who buy certain merchandise can claim a refund of the value-added taxes they pay.

zh.title: 前往欧洲的旅客可能正在浪费金钱。原因如下
zh.summary: 访问欧洲的美国游客可以申请退回在某些购买上支付的增值税。这个经常被忽视的机会允许游客通过增值税退款计划收回大部分销售税。

title: Stocks including Nvidia and Apple are top picks as market run-up continues, Bank of America says
summary: Bank of America has identified Nvidia and Apple among its top stock recommendations as the market continues its upward trajectory. The bank provides its investment picks for investors considering June portfolio decisions.
content: Bank of America named some of its favorite stocks to buy in June.

zh.title: 美国银行表示，包括英伟达和苹果在内的股票是市场持续上涨时的热门选择
zh.summary: 美国银行已将英伟达和苹果列为其顶级股票推荐，因为市场继续上升轨道。该银行为考虑六月投资组合决策的投资者提供其投资选择。

title: Micron is one of the most overbought stocks after this week’s rally to new highs
summary: Semiconductor company Micron Technology rallied to new highs this week alongside other tech stocks, but technical indicators suggest the stock may be overbought. Investors have poured capital into chip makers and technology firms, driving sharp gains. The momentum raises concerns about potential near-term pullbacks.
content: Investors poured love into stocks such as Micron Technology and Dell Technologies this week.

zh.title: 美光是本周创新高后最超买的股票之一
zh.summary: 半导体公司美光科技本周与其他科技股一起上涨至新高,但技术指标表明该股可能被超买。投资者向芯片制造商和科技公司投入了大量资本,推动了急剧上升。这种势头引发了对潜在短期回调的担忧。

title: Oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz might not return to levels seen before the Iran war
summary: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted freedom of navigation through this critical global oil transport corridor. The geopolitical tensions raise significant questions about whether oil exports will recover to pre-conflict levels. This standoff has major implications for energy markets and international shipping.
content: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has seriously challenged freedom of navigation in the sea lane, raising questions about the future.

zh.title: 通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油出口可能无法回到伊朗战争前的水平
zh.summary: 伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁严重扰乱了通过这条关键全球石油运输走廊的航行自由。地缘政治紧张局势提出了重大疑问,石油出口是否会恢复到冲突前水平。这一僵局对能源市场和国际航运产生了重大影响。

title: Josh Brown, counting on a new momentum strategy, thinks investors want more than index funds
summary: Investment strategist Josh Brown has launched a new separately managed account designed to identify and capitalize on what he views as the market's best opportunities. Brown's active stock-picking approach directly challenges the popularity of passive index fund investing. The strategy reflects ongoing debate about active versus passive investment philosophies.
content: Brown debuted a separately managed account named after a premium cut of steak — built to hold what he considers the market's best opportunities.

zh.title: 约什·布朗依靠新的动量策略,认为投资者需要的不仅仅是指数基金
zh.summary: 投资策略师约什·布朗推出了一个新的单独管理账户,旨在识别和利用他认为的市场最佳机会。布朗的积极选股方法直接挑战了被动指数基金投资的流行。这一策略反映了关于主动与被动投资理念的持续争论。

title: 3 themes that drove stocks to another week of records — and a banner month
summary: The S&P 500 extended its winning streak to nine consecutive weeks as specific market themes continue driving stock prices to fresh records. This sustained rally marks a strong month of market performance. Key thematic catalysts are propelling equities higher.
content: The S&P 500 extended its winning streak to nine weeks.

zh.title: 推动股市再创新高的3个主题与创纪录月份
zh.summary: 标普500指数连续九周创历史新高，特定市场主题不断推动股票价格再创纪录。这种持续的涨势标志着市场表现强劲的一个月。关键主题催化剂继续推动股市上升。

title: Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
summary: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has significantly underperformed the S&P 500 in 2026, with its B shares trailing by a record 16.3 percentage points year-to-date. This marks the widest performance gap between Berkshire and the benchmark index so far this year. The divergence reflects contrasting investment strategies between Buffett's approach and the broader market rally.
content: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.

zh.title: 伯克希尔跑输火热的标普500指数，创今年最大落后幅度
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特的伯克希尔哈撒韦公司在2026年大幅跑输标普500指数，其B股年初至今落后创纪录的16.3个百分点。这标志着伯克希尔与基准指数之间今年迄今最大的表现差距。这种分歧反映了巴菲特的投资策略与更广泛市场涨势之间形成的对比。

title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
summary: Meta is attempting to diversify revenue beyond online advertising, but its track record suggests success is uncertain. The company faces significant challenges building viable business models outside its core ad business.
content: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.

zh.title: Meta在广告之外的销售上举步维艰。人工智能会改变这一切吗?
zh.summary: Meta试图将收入来源从在线广告多元化，但其历史记录表明成功前景并不确定。该公司在核心广告业务之外建立可行商业模式方面面临重大挑战。

title: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality
summary: While stock markets have experienced strong gains, consumers have absorbed rising energy prices stemming from geopolitical tensions. This divergence highlights growing economic inequality between asset holders and wage earners.
content: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.

zh.title: 分析：伊朗战争的结束可能只是美国不平等新时代的开始
zh.summary: 虽然股票市场经历了强劲增长，但消费者承受了源于地缘政治紧张局势的能源价格上升。这种差异突显了资产持有者和薪资收入者之间日益增长的经济不平等。

title: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
summary: Gen Z consumers are driving renewed interest in theatrical experiences, particularly for anime and video game adaptations, attracted by affordable and social entertainment. This demographic shift signals potential recovery in the struggling cinema industry.
content: Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters.

zh.title: Z世代会成为振兴电影院的一代吗?
zh.summary: Z世代消费者正在推动对戏院体验的新兴趣，特别是对动漫和视频游戏改编作品的兴趣，他们被廉价且社交的娱乐所吸引。这种人口统计转变预示着苦苦挣扎的电影院业的潜在复苏。

title: What would cause the Fed to hike rates this year? The answer might surprise you.
summary: The Federal Reserve under Kevin Warsh's leadership is preparing for a possible policy shift toward tighter monetary conditions later this month. The specific triggers for rate hikes may differ from conventional expectations.
content: Later this month, the Kevin Warsh-led central bank will start preparing a possible pivot to tighter policy.

zh.title: 是什么会促使美联储今年加息？答案可能出乎意料。
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什领导下的美联储正在准备在本月晚些时候可能转向更紧缩的货币政策。加息的具体触发因素可能与传统预期不同。

title: Trump’s physician says the president is in 'excellent health' and is 'fully fit' to serve
summary: President Trump underwent comprehensive medical evaluations including CT scans, cardiac imaging, cancer screenings, and assessments by 22 specialists. His physician declared him in excellent health and fully fit to serve.
content: Trump underwent a CT scan and other heart imaging, along with cancer screenings and other preventative assessments carried out by 22 specialists.

zh.title: 特朗普医生称总统身体"极好"，完全"适合"继续任职
zh.summary: 特朗普总统接受了全面的医学评估，包括CT扫描、心脏成像、癌症筛查和22位专家的评估。他的医生宣称他身体状况极好，完全适合继续任职。

title: ‘I have no preexisting conditions’: I’m 56, earn $198,000 and want to retire early. Can I afford private healthcare?
summary: A 56-year-old earning $198,000 annually explores whether early retirement (FIRE) is financially feasible while accounting for private healthcare costs. The case examines balancing early retirement goals with long-term healthcare affordability.
content: “I’m trying to figure out whether it’s worth my while achieving FIRE.”

zh.title: "我没有既往病史"：我56岁，年收入198,000美元，想要提前退休。我能负担得起私人医疗保险吗？
zh.summary: 一位56岁、年收入198,000美元的人探讨早期退休（FIRE）在考虑私人医疗保险成本的情况下是否在经济上可行。该案例审视了平衡早期退休目标与长期医疗可负担性的问题。

title: Best car insurance for veterans and military families in 2026
summary: USAA and Geico are highlighted as top insurance options for active-duty military, veterans, and their families. These providers offer specialized coverage and benefits tailored to military demographics.
content: USAA and Geico are among our picks for active-duty military members, veterans and their families.

zh.title: 2026年退伍军人和军人家庭最佳汽车保险
zh.summary: USAA和Geico被列为现役军人、退伍军人及其家人的最佳保险选择。这些提供商提供为军人群体量身定制的专业保险覆盖和福利。

title: ‘It is such a fine line’: I am a CFP and see nothing wrong with networking on the golf course. Am I wrong?
summary: A certified financial planner questions the ethics of business development conducted on the golf course. The article explores professional boundaries and relationship-building practices in financial services.
content: “I would love to develop working relationships with almost everyone I play golf with.”

zh.title: "界线很细微"：作为财务规划师，我认为在高尔夫球场上建立人脉没有问题。我错了吗？
zh.summary: 一位认证财务规划师对在高尔夫球场上进行业务开发的道德问题提出质疑。文章探讨了金融服务行业中的职业边界和关系建立实践。

title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
summary: Foundation Robotics Labs, a startup with Trump family connections, is developing plans to deploy humanoid robots for military applications within 12-18 months. The effort represents growing private sector involvement in defense robotics.
content: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.

zh.title: 与特朗普相关的初创公司计划在军队中部署类人形机器人
zh.summary: 与特朗普家族有关联的初创公司Foundation Robotics Labs正在制定计划，在12-18个月内为军事应用部署类人形机器人。这项努力代表了私营部门在国防机器人领域参与的增加。

title: U.S. general meets Cuban military officials at edge of Guantanamo Bay
summary: General Francis Donovan held meetings with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay amid escalating tensions and concerns about potential U.S. military action against Cuba. The engagement reflects heightened geopolitical concerns in the region.
content: General Francis Donovan's meeting in Cuba comes amid growing concerns of a possible U.S. military attack on the Communist-run island.

zh.title: 美国将军在关塔那摩湾边缘与古巴军方官员会晤
zh.summary: 美国将军弗朗西斯·多诺万在关塔那摩湾附近与古巴军方官员举行会议，此时美古关系紧张加剧，人们对美国可能对古巴采取军事行动感到担忧。这次会议反映了该地区地缘政治局势的加剧。

title: Arrive three hours before flight home, airline boss tells UK holidaymakers
summary: Wizz Air CEO advises UK holidaymakers to arrive three hours before flights and carry portable chargers due to extended airport queues. The guidance reflects current airport congestion and operational challenges across the network.
content: Wizz Air CEO Yvonne Moynihan also advises passengers to carry portable chargers and water due to lengthy queues.

zh.title: 航空公司老板告诉英国度假者要在航班前三小时抵达
zh.summary: 威兹航空首席执行官建议英国度假者在航班前三小时抵达并携带便携式充电器，以应对机场排队延长的情况。该指导反映了整个网络中当前的机场拥堵和运营挑战。

title: U.S. support for Taiwan reaffirmed by members of Congress even after Trump called arms sales a 'negotiating chip' with China
summary: Congressional members reaffirmed U.S. support for Taiwan's security despite President Trump characterizing $14 billion in approved arms sales as a negotiation tool with China. The statement reflects tensions between executive and legislative branches on Taiwan policy.
content: President Donald Trump has referred to $14 billion in arms sales to the island, which has been approved by Congress, as a "negotiating chip" with China.

zh.title: 尽管特朗普将军售称为与中国的"谈判筹码"，美国国会议员仍重申对台湾的支持
zh.summary: 美国国会议员重申对台湾安全的支持，尽管总统特朗普将140亿美元的已批准军售描述为与中国谈判的工具。这一声明反映了行政部门与立法部门在台湾政策上的紧张关系。

title: Hegseth praises Asian allies for 'burden-sharing,' calls out China's role in the region
summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth praised Asian allies for sharing military and security responsibilities while warning against Chinese hegemonic expansion in the region. The statement reflects the U.S. administration's commitment to maintaining regional security partnerships amid growing Chinese geopolitical influence.
content: Hegseth said that China cannot impose its hegemony on U.S. partners and allies in the region.

zh.title: 黑格斯称赞亚洲盟国"分担责任"，点名中国在该地区的角色
zh.summary: 国防部长黑格斯称赞亚洲盟国分担军事和安全责任，同时警告中国在该地区的霸权扩张。这一声明反映了美国政府致力于在中国地缘政治影响力不断增长的背景下维持地区安全伙伴关系的承诺。

title: How a borough in Merseyside is bucking the UK's youth unemployment trend
summary: A Merseyside borough successfully reduces youth unemployment through personalized early intervention programs targeting under-16s. The approach offers a potential model for addressing the UK's broader youth employment crisis and NEET populations.
content: Could personalised early intervention help prevent under-16s falling into the Neet trap?

zh.title: 梅塞德赛德郡一个地区如何打破英国青年失业趋势
zh.summary: 梅塞德赛德郡的一个地区通过针对16岁以下青少年的个性化早期干预项目成功降低了青年失业率。该方法为解决英国更广泛的青年就业危机和NEET人口提供了一个潜在模式。

title: Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge rules
summary: A federal judge has ruled that Trump's name must be removed from the Kennedy Center, determining that the institution belongs to the American people. Rep. Joyce Beatty's lawsuit successfully challenged the renaming. The decision represents a major outcome in the ongoing dispute over the performing arts center's naming.
content: "The Kennedy Center is an institution that belongs to the American people, not to Donald Trump," said Rep. Joyce Beatty, who sued over the renaming.

zh.title: 法官判令特朗普名字必须从肯尼迪中心移除
zh.summary: 一位联邦法官裁定，特朗普的名字必须从肯尼迪中心移除，并认定该机构属于美国人民。众议员乔伊斯·比蒂的诉讼成功地挑战了该中心的改名。这一裁决代表了关于这家表演艺术中心命名权争议的重大结果。
